src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/configu.general_idea: Remove inheritance from WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter which was deprecated in Spring Security 5.7 and removed in 6.0.
src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/configu.human_impl: Changed class declaration from 'extends WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter' to a standalone class with @EnableWebSecurity.

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/configu.general_idea: Enable method-level security annotations using the new @EnableMethodSecurity annotation required in Spring Security 6.
src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/configu.human_impl: Added @EnableMethodSecurity(securedEnabled = true) annotation to the configuration class.

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/configu.general_idea: Replace the deprecated configure(HttpSecurity) method override with a SecurityFilterChain bean definition.
src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/configu.human_impl: Defined a @Bean method returning SecurityFilterChain that configures HttpSecurity via the builder pattern.

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/configu.general_idea: Update authorization configuration to use the new authorizeHttpRequests API instead of the deprecated authorizeRequests.
src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/configu.human_impl: Replaced .authorizeRequests() with .authorizeHttpRequests(registry -> { ... }) and updated matchers to requestMatchers.

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/configu.general_idea: Update filter registration to use the new addFilterBefore API with UsernamePasswordAuthenticationFilter.

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/reposit.general_idea: Migrate the UserRepository from Spring Data JPA to jOOQ for database access.
src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/reposit.human_impl: Changed class from interface extending JpaRepository to class using DSLContext and Zkmf2024UserDao.

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/rest/Au.general_idea: Update validation imports from javax.validation to jakarta.validation to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3/Java 21.
Remove Firebase Auth integration as the authentication mechanism is being migrated to a local database-backed JWT system.
src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/rest/Au.human_impl: Removed imports for com.google.firebase.auth and deleted the registerBand method that used FirebaseAuth.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 2.6.2 to 3.2.0 to support Java 21 and modern Spring features.
Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
Replace MySQL connector with PostgreSQL driver to match the new database backend.
Replace MySQL testcontainers with PostgreSQL testcontainers for integration tests.
